item.title: Cg1
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: GRMZM5G838324 Gene Symbol: Cg1 Gene Name: Corngrass1 Genome: B73_RefGen_v3 Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: Furthermore, a target of Cg1 is teosinte glume architecture1 (tga1)1, a gene known to have had a role in the domestication of maize from teosinte.

item.title: ZmDAR1;limtf4
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: GRMZM2G099328 Gene Symbol: ZmDAR1 limtf4 Gene Name: LIM-transcription factor 4 Genome: B73_RefGen_v3 Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: The over-expression of Zmda1 and ZmDAR1 promoted kernel development, resulting in a more developed basal endosperm transfer cell layer (BETL) than WT and enhanced expression of starch synthase genes.

item.title: ZmWUS1-B
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Gene Symbol: ZmWUS1-B Gene Name: WUS1 protein Genome: Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: ZmWUS1-B is controlled by a spontaneously generated novel promoter region that dramatically increases its expression and alters patterning and development of young ears.
